seoTitle: Aldine ISD Calendar 2025-2026: Key Dates & Holidays
seoDescription: Aldine ISD 2025-2026 calendar summary with July 24 first day, June 18 last day, Thanksgiving, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, and key holidays.
calendarNotes: Aldine ISD did not provide an official 2025-2026 PDF URL with this source package. This summary uses the official Aldine ISD calendar page together with a local reference PDF generated from district calendar information. Families should verify campus-specific changes through Aldine ISD, especially if their school follows a specialized or additional-days schedule.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Aldine ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The local 2025-2026 reference calendar lists Thursday, July 24, 2025 as the first day of classes.

calendarFaqs.q: Is there an official Aldine ISD 2025-2026 PDF link?
calendarFaqs.a: No official 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided. MySchoolDates summarizes the official calendar page and a local reference PDF generated from district calendar information.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Aldine ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break is listed from Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Aldine ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The local reference calendar lists Thursday, June 18, 2026 as the last day of classes and the last day for teachers.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The local reference calendar lists July 24, 2025 as the first day of classes.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break is listed for March 16-20, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Official PDF URL
yearNumbers.detail: No official Aldine ISD 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided with the source information.

events.name: Last Day of Classes/Last Day for Teachers
